title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Saksoft

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Saksoft
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Saksoft. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Jaipur-based team.

About Saksoft:
Saksoft is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Saksoft!
